case_title: MEADOR, KATY S., RECEIVER vs. MAZE, PATRICIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEADOR, KATY S., RECEIVER SERVED AUG-19-1994, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
